USDT QR Code Generator

Enter Your USDT address to create a QR Code:








On our website You can create a QR code for your USDT (ERC-20, TRC-20, BEP-20, Omni, BEP-2) address. To do this, you need to insert the address of your Tether (ERC-20, TRC-20, BEP-20, Omni, BEP-2) wallet, and press the button. And then our site will create you a QR code of your USDT address, to which you can send USDTs, after scanning this QR code. This greatly facilitates the transfer of USDTs from one address to another, since the USDT (ERC-20, TRC-20, BEP-20, Omni, BEP-2) wallet address itself can not be remembered or rewritten manually, so our site will simplify your life by creating a long Tether address, just one picture with a QR code. Tether tokens are the most widely adopted stablecoins, having pioneered the concept in the digital token space. A disruptor to the conventional financial system and a trailblazer in the digital use of traditional currencies, Tether Tokens support and empower growing ventures and innovation throughout the blockchain space. Tether Tokens exist as a digital token built on multiple blockchains. All Tether tokens (USD₮) are pegged at 1-to-1 with a matching fiat currency and are backed 100% by Tether’s reserves. Create one or many USDT QR codes in no time. All generated QR codes will work forever, do not expire and have no scanning limits. Tether (often called by its symbol USDT) is a stablecoin cryptocurrency that is hosted on the Ethereum blockchain (ERC-20, TRC-20, BEP-20, Omni, BEP-2).
